scripts.db:migrate: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0" && prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:generate: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0" && prisma generate
